problems: Weak headline above the fold – 'Why Choose Us as Your Local Primary Care Dentist?' lacks impact.
CTA button 'Contact Us' is not prominently placed, reducing visibility and urgency.
Phone number is not visible on mobile, making it difficult for potential clients to reach out.
money_impact: Lower conversion on first visit due to non-engaging headline.
Reduced inquiries due to buried CTA.
Fewer calls from mobile users because of hidden contact information.
